name: Annual Penetration Testing
description: Ensures penetration testing is performed at least annually and after significant changes (PCI DSS 11.3)
query: SELECT id, scope, last_test_date, test_provider FROM penetration_tests WHERE cde_scope = true AND (last_test_date IS NULL OR last_test_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Schedule and complete annual penetration testing of the CDE. Retest after significant infrastructure changes.
